title: Multilingual ASR at 1,000 Languages: What Still Breaks

pages.title: Scarcity Has Several Levers
pages.kicker: Multilingual pretraining lowers the starting cost, but local evidence still decides whether a model can ship.

cards.title: Shared pretraining
cards.body: Large multilingual encoders transfer acoustic and linguistic structure.

cards.title: Targeted adaptation
cards.body: Adapters and contextual biasing focus limited local data.

cards.title: Error-driven data
cards.body: Collect consented examples around systematic product failures.

cards.title: Community review
cards.body: Native speakers define conventions and approve release behavior.

pages.title: Local Release Signals
pages.kicker: One aggregate WER cannot represent who is served well or what errors remain dangerous.

cards.title: Critical entities
cards.body: Measure names, numbers, addresses, dates, and domain terms separately.

cards.title: Language varieties
cards.body: Report dialect, region, script, age, and code-switch patterns.

cards.title: Target acoustics
cards.body: Test the real microphone, noise, distance, codec, and packet loss.

cards.title: Failure confidence
cards.body: Track wrong-language output, silence hallucination, and calibration.
